home.title: 🏆 My Volley
home.subtitle: Live Scouting & Stats
home.howItWorksP1: 1. Tap "New Match", name both teams and start the game.
home.howItWorksP2: 2. Add players with their jersey numbers to the Roster — everything syncs to the Cloud automatically.
home.howItWorksP3: 3. Tap "+" below the score → choose the action → tap the interactive court (precise position) → select the player.
home.howItWorksP4: 4. Tap "End Set" to move to the next set. Court sides swap automatically.
home.howItWorksP5: 5. Check per-player stats, the precision heatmap and AI-powered tactical analysis in the Stats tab.
home.howItWorksP6: 6. Export your data as PNG, Excel (XLSX) or share the match via a unique read-only link.
home.interactiveCourtHint: Disable to score faster, without court positioning.
home.performanceModeHint: Detailed rally-by-rally tracking: trajectories, positions and quality rating for every action.
home.finishMatchDesc: The current set will be finalized and the match will be marked as finished. This action is irreversible.
home.deleteMatchDesc: This action is irreversible. All match data (scores, heatmaps, statistics) will be permanently lost.
home.inviteDesc: Share My Volley with your teammates and coaches to analyze your matches together.
home.inviteAlreadyRegistered: This user is already registered on My Volley!
home.inviteText: Check out My Volley — the free volleyball scouting app: live scoring, precision heatmaps, AI tactical analysis, tournament management and court finder. The ultimate volleyball companion 🏐
home.inviteErrorDesc: Could not copy the link. Please try again.
home.welcomeText: The scouting and statistics app built for volleyball coaches and players. Score in real time, generate precision heatmaps, get AI-powered tactical insights and export your data in one tap.
home.shareMatchText: Check out the stats and heatmap from this match on My Volley — live scoring, detailed analysis and full export 🏐
home.whatsNewSavedPlayersDesc: Save your regular players and default roster. Add them in one tap when creating a match, complete with their default jersey numbers.
home.whatsNewCustomActionsDesc: Create your own stat buttons: hide actions you don't need, add neutral match events (reception, pass, defense) and track exactly what matters to your team.
home.whatsNewPerfModeDesc: Analyze your game in depth: track every ball touch, trace the exact position and trajectory of each action, rate quality (🔴 🟠 🟢) and visualize everything on the court.
home.whatsNewTournamentsDesc: Organize tournaments end-to-end: create pools or brackets, share the registration link via QR code and broadcast live scores to players and spectators.
home.whatsNewSpotsDesc: Explore the community map of volleyball courts near you. Add your favorite spots with photos, reviews and practical info to help fellow players.
home.whatsNewAiAnalysisDesc: Get an automatic tactical report at the end of every match: strengths, weaknesses and areas for improvement for each team, powered by AI from your match data.
home.whatsNewSpotFiltersDesc: Refine your search by surface type (sand, grass, hard court, indoor), available equipment (net, lighting, changing rooms) or category to find the perfect court near you.
home.noFinishedMatch: No finished match yet. Play your first match to get an AI tactical analysis!

credits.title: Project Story
credits.storyP1: My Volley was built with passion by Antonin Marcon, an independent developer based in South-West France. The app was born from a very concrete need: helping his own volleyball team analyze their matches and improve together — hence the project name!
credits.storyP2: Today, My Volley is used by coaches, players and amateur clubs who want to track and analyze their performance with precision — from real-time scoring to AI-powered tactical analysis.
credits.supportDesc: My Volley is free and always will be. If the app helps you in your day-to-day, you can support its development by buying the developer a coffee!
credits.basketDesc: Complete basketball scouting: match sheets, live team statistics and performance analysis.
credits.tennisDesc: Ultra-precise tennis tracking: set-by-set statistics, match dynamics, bounce zones and shot analysis.
credits.padelDesc: 100% Padel scouting: point and fault mapping, pair analysis and live statistics.

settings.feedbackPlaceholder: Share your suggestions, report a bug or propose an improvement…

settings.logoDesc: Add your club or team logo. It will replace the My Volley logo on the home screen.
settings.logoTooLarge: Image must be less than 2 MB.
settings.notifDesc: Get analysis tips and match reminders to make the most of My Volley.

help.title: Help Center
help.scoringP1: Tap "+" below the scoring team's score, choose the action (attack, ace, block, opponent fault…), then place it on the interactive court to record the exact position. Then select the relevant player.
help.scoringP2: The score updates automatically. Each recorded action awards 1 point to the team (except neutral match events like reception or passing, which don't affect the score).
help.heatmapP1: In the Statistics tab, the heatmap displays each team's impact zones as a color gradient. Hot zones (bright red) indicate where the most points were scored; cold zones (blue) show less active areas.
help.heatmapP2: Filter by set, action type (attacks, faults, aces, blocks…) and team for ultra-precise tactical analysis. Export the heatmap as a high-resolution PNG for your training reports and pre-match presentations.
help.teamP1: Add your players with their jersey numbers in the Roster. Numbers significantly speed up live scouting — instantly identify the player on the court without searching for their name.
help.teamP2: Players and their statistics are synced to the Cloud. Reuse them across matches and access their complete performance history at any time.
help.volleyballScored: Points Won: Attack, Ace, Block, Tip (feint), Second touch.
help.volleyballFaults: Opponent Faults: Out, Net, Missed serve, Block Out, Gameplay fault, Opponent fault.
help.volleyballNote: The set ends manually with "End Set". Court sides swap automatically between sets.
help.exportDesc: Export your statistics as PNG (high-resolution capture), Excel (XLSX) with per-set and per-player breakdowns, or share the complete match via a unique read-only link — accessible to anyone, even without an account.
help.feedbackPlaceholder: Your suggestion, bug report or improvement idea…
help.playersDesc: Save your regular players from the "Players" menu. When creating a match, add them in one tap with their default jersey numbers. No more repetitive setup before every game!
help.actionsDesc: Standard stats not enough? Create your own action buttons (e.g., "Pipe", "Setter tip") from the "Actions" menu. You can also add neutral match events (reception, pass, defense) for complete tracking without affecting the score.
help.perfModeDesc: Enable Performance Mode when creating a match to unlock full play-by-play tracking. Record the origin and destination of every ball, trace trajectories, rate each action's quality (🔴 🟠 🟢) and generate ultra-detailed heatmaps.
help.tournamentsDesc: Create a tournament (pools, brackets or championship) from the main menu. Share the registration link or QR code with players so they can sign up and log scores. A Spectator link lets everyone follow standings and results live.
help.aiAnalysisDesc: At the end of a match (or mid-game), tap "Analysis" in the Stats tab to generate an automatic tactical report. The AI summarizes each team's strengths and weaknesses, identifies playing patterns and suggests concrete areas for improvement based on your data.
help.spotFiltersDesc: On the court map, use filters to refine your search: surface type (sand, grass, hard court, indoor), available equipment (permanent net, night lighting, changing rooms, showers) and category. Find the perfect court in seconds.
help.spotsDesc: Discover the community map of volleyball courts. Search for a court near you, suggest a new one with photos and a detailed description, and leave reviews to help fellow players find the perfect spot.
help.contactDesc: Have a question, a bug to report, or a feature idea? We'd love to hear from you.

userMenu.feedbackPlaceholder: Share your suggestions, report a bug or propose an idea…

scoreboard.confirmEndMatchDesc: Are you sure you want to end this match? The score will be finalized and final statistics will be generated. You won't be able to add more points after this.
scoreboard.touchCourtNeutral: Tap the court where the action occurred
scoreboard.perfOnboardingP1: You can now track every rally from start to finish with full play-by-play logging.
scoreboard.perfOnboardingP2: Court placement limits are disabled to give you full freedom of positioning.
scoreboard.perfOnboardingP3: In the "Custom Actions" menu, enable trajectories for any action and activate quality rating (🔴 🟠 🟢) to measure the precision of every touch.

resetPassword.title: New password

notFound.message: Oops! This page doesn't exist or has been moved.

matchPage.helpVolleyP1: 1. Tap "+" below the relevant team's score. An animated arrow shows the selected team.
matchPage.helpVolleyP2: 2. Choose the tab: Points Won (Attack, Ace, Block, Tip, Second touch) or Opponent Faults (Out, Net, Missed serve, Block Out).
matchPage.helpVolleyP3: 3. Select the action, place it on the interactive court (the allowed zone lights up) then choose the player. You can also rate the action's quality if the option is enabled.
matchPage.helpVolleyP4: 4. Manage sets: "End Set" finishes the current set and swaps sides automatically. The winner 🏆 is the team with the most sets won.
matchPage.helpVolleyP5: 5. Statistics & Replay: the Stats tab shows per-player points and the heatmap. Tap a completed set in the history to activate Replay mode and relive every rally.
matchPage.helpVolleyP6: 6. Export & Share: export stats as PNG, court per set, Excel summary, or share the score via WhatsApp, Telegram or X.

actionsDesc.attack: Successful attack that lands on the opponent's court.
actionsDesc.ace: Direct winning serve that the opponent cannot return.
actionsDesc.block: Point scored at the net: the ball is sent directly back to the opponent's side.
actionsDesc.bidouille: Tip or deflection at the net that catches the opponent off guard.
actionsDesc.seconde_main: Point scored on the 2nd touch (attacking pass by the setter).
actionsDesc.other_offensive: Offensive action that doesn't match any other category.
actionsDesc.out: Ball sent out of bounds by the opponent.
actionsDesc.net_fault: Opponent touches the net or sends the ball into the net.
actionsDesc.service_miss: Missed serve: ball doesn't clear the net or lands out of bounds.
actionsDesc.block_out: The opponent's block deflects the ball out of bounds.
actionsDesc.gameplay_fault: Includes net faults, under-the-net penetration or foot faults.
actionsDesc.opponent_fault: Any fault committed by the opponent that doesn't fit another category.
actionsDesc.other_volley_fault: Specific fault that doesn't match any other category.
actionsDesc.timeout: Timeout called by one of the two teams.
actionsDesc.other_volley_neutral: Generic neutral action with no impact on the score.

actionsConfig.title: My Volleyball Settings
actionsConfig.description: Fully customize your stat buttons: hide actions you don't need, create your own and add "Match Events" (neutral actions like reception, pass or defense) for complete tracking without affecting the score.

notifications.promptText: Enable notifications to receive analysis tips and reminders before your matches.
